'''vawufu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oikumene|oikumene]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-w-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oikumene|oikumene]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| vawufu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:væwifith|væwifith]] || [[word:væwifij|væwifij]] || [[word:væwifish|væwifish]] || [[word:væwifi|væwifi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:vawuwufuth|vawuwufuth]] || [[word:vawuwufuj|vawuwufuj]] || [[word:vawuwufush|vawuwufush]] || [[word:vawuwufu|vawuwufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:vawufuth|vawufuth]] || [[word:vawufuj|vawufuj]] || [[word:vawufush|vawufush]] || [[word:vawufu|vawufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:vawuffuth|vawuffuth]] || [[word:vawuffuj|vawuffuj]] || [[word:vawuffush|vawuffush]] || [[word:vawuffuf|vawuffuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vawufuthu|vawufuthu]] || [[word:vawufuju|vawufuju]] || [[word:vawufushu|vawufushu]] || [[word:vawufuku|vawufuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vawufuth|vawufuth]] || [[word:vawufuj|vawufuj]] || [[word:vawufush|vawufush]] || [[word:vawufu|vawufu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vawufuthul|vawufuthul]] || [[word:vawufujul|vawufujul]] || [[word:vawufushul|vawufushul]] || [[word:vawufukul|vawufukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vawufuthuthu|vawufuthuthu]] || [[word:vawufujuju|vawufujuju]] || [[word:vawufushushu|vawufushushu]] || [[word:vawufuku|vawufuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vawufuthun|vawufuthun]] || [[word:vawufujun|vawufujun]] || [[word:vawufushun|vawufushun]] || [[word:vawufukun|vawufukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vawufuthuoro|vawufuthuoro]] || [[word:vawufujuoro|vawufujuoro]] || [[word:vawufushuoro|vawufushuoro]] || [[word:vawufukuoro|vawufukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|28ebc72}}
